boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment or vendor action when emergency exception expired before release date
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL confirms validity window current and tied to action
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in source records
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Exception validity window current per CTL; matches actor/scope/date

final_answer: Source records close the boundary. CTL establishes exception validity window as current, exact, and matched to the action. Execution may proceed per policy. FBK and BND provide context only; they do not override CTL. Anomaly noise does not alter source closure.
